turns.message: Approve todays balanced plan

I can’t approve routes from here (read-only), and I also don’t have today’s plan loaded yet.

What you need to do in the UI:
- Open **Route Planner**
- Select **Today → Plan: “balanced”**
- Click **Approve Route / Approve Plan** (top-right on the plan view)
- Confirm the approval prompt

If you want, I can first fetch **today’s balanced plan** and summarize what you’re approving (routes, stops, distance, on-time %, capacity, any overloads).
